name: The Patient Knife
specialty: A versatile team of rift explorers, specializing in navigating and mapping the ever-shifting dimensions to discover valuable resources and hidden treasures.

members.name: Elysia Thornwhisper
members.note: Known for her stoic demeanor and unwavering resolve, she leads with a quiet authority that commands respect.

members.name: Vex Silvershroud
members.note: His keen senses and ability to follow trails in the most treacherous conditions make him an invaluable asset to the team.

members.name: Gideon Ironfist
members.note: A veteran of numerous rift battles, his battle-hardened physique and indomitable spirit make him a formidable force in combat.

visual: Clad in leather armor and armed with an assortment of unique weapons, they move with a purposeful stride through the Undercity's labyrinthine streets. A distinctive silver knife, symbolizing their guild name, is always worn by each member.
reputation_note: Whispers of their daring rift exploits and the treasure they've amassed make them a name to be reckoned with, yet their unwavering loyalty to one another and their mysterious, unaligned status keep them shrouded in intrigue.
